creator: radovanovic@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Andrej Ebert from comment #12)
Can you please try to pull stack backtrace from this crash dump - for example:
$ gdb `which mono` mono.core 
(gdb) bt
<STACKTRACE WILL BE HERE>

Problem is that mono's implementation of pulling process name is quite complicated, this would give me pointer where to look for problem

(In reply to Konstantin Belousov from comment #17)
Unfortunately without me manually creating test case in C the only self contained test case for you would be to install mono and to try to run that attached test case (compile with "mono process_name.cs" and run with "mono process_name.exe").
